description: OPT-IN pre-edit hard-block fragment for codex-reflector on Codex (KTD-12). NOT wired by default: install-codex.sh merges this only with --preedit. Routes PreToolUse through hooks/codex-reflector-preedit-hook.sh, which exports REFLECTOR_HOST=codex + REFLECTOR_PREEDIT_BLOCK=1 then execs the reflector. This hook forks python3 on every matched edit BEFORE it lands, so it is kept out of the default codex-hooks.json (mirrors fix M-A: PreToolUse is absent from committed hooks/hooks.json). respond_pretooluse still self-gates on REFLECTOR_PREEDIT_BLOCK and returns None when off.
